name: How is fault decided in Utah work slip cases?
description: Evidence/jury for third-parties; none for comp.

mainEntity.name: How is fault decided in Utah work slip cases?

acceptedAnswer.text: Evidence/jury for third-parties; none for comp.
acceptedAnswer.description: **For comp, irrelevant; third-party: jury assigns percentages via evidence like warnings ignored.** Comparative negligence.[2][4] Key factors: Burden on you to prove hazard known. Experts testify. Under 50% fault ok. Avoid horseplay proof.
